程序包 cn.edu.bupt.tarecruitment.service

类 RecruitmentService

java.lang.Object
cn.edu.bupt.tarecruitment.service.RecruitmentService
public class RecruitmentService extends Object
Coordinates the recruitment business workflow and enforces validation rules.
